text:
MC_PLAN_OPRTG_AUTHRTY_CD equal “10”, the corresponding valid values associated with these 
respective operating authorities. 

This data element also triggers the individual operating authority indicators such as 
OPRTG_AUTHRTY_1115_DEMO_WVR_IND, etc. that appear on the APL base file. If any of the 
MC_PLAN_OPRTG_AUTHRTY_CD data elements contain a value of “02,” for example, then 
OPRTG_AUTHRTY_1915B_WVR_IND will be triggered.
